display.purpose: Home greeting only. <em> sets in ember, never italic.

headline.purpose: Section titles, always preceded by mono numeral eyebrow.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and controls. Cap line length 60-65ch.

label.purpose: Mono, tracked open, often uppercase. Eyebrows, kbd, status timestamps, units.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Resting card shadow. Inset highlight + ambient drop, always together.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state. Adds 1px ember-soft outer ring.

shadows.name: shadow-popover
shadows.purpose: Search results dropdown. Single deep ambient drop, no inset.

motion.name: ease-system
motion.purpose: The only easing. Ease-out-quart-ish. Nothing bounces or overshoots.

motion.name: pulse-up
motion.purpose: Status-up halo pulse. The system's heartbeat.

components.name: Quicklinks card
components.description: Signature jump-off tile: icon well, title with status dot, mono description, corner arrow on hover.
components.html: Plexmedia.local:32400
components.css: .ds-qlink{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;width:240px;height:68px;padding:12px 14px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:var(--radius);box-shadow:0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset,0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28);text-decoration:none;color:var(--ink);transition:transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1),background 140ms,border-color 140ms,box-shadow 180ms;position:relative}.ds-qlink:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);background:var(--bg-card-hi);border-color:var(--line);box-shadow:0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .06) inset,0 14px 36px oklch(0 0 0 / .38),0 0 0 1px var(--ember-soft)}.ds-qlink-icon{display:grid;place-items:center;width:38px;height:38px;background:oklch(1 0 0 / .04);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:8px;color:var(--ink-dim);flex:none}.ds-qlink-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;min-width:0;flex:1}.ds-qlink-title{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font:600 13.5px/1.3 Inter,sans-serif;letter-spacing:-0.005em;transition:color 140ms}.ds-qlink:hover .ds-qlink-title{color:var(--ember-hi)}.ds-qlink-desc{font:500 11px/1.2 'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:var(--ink-faint)}.ds-status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--status-up);animation:ds-pulse 2.6s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) infinite}.ds-qlink-arrow{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;color:var(--ember-hi);opacity:0;transform:translate(0,0);transition:opacity 180ms,transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1)}.ds-qlink:hover .ds-qlink-arrow{opacity:1;transform:translate(2px,-2px)}@keyframes ds-pulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 60%,transparent)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 0%,transparent)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 0%,transparent)}}

components.name: Icon button
components.description: 36x36 chrome control. Resting bg-card, hover bg-card-hi, no ember warm.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Refresh"><svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='16' height='16' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.7'><path d='M4 12a8 8 0 0 1 14-5.3M20 4v4h-4M20 12a8 8 0 0 1-14 5.3M4 20v-4h4'/></svg></button>

components.name: Nav pill
components.description: The single chrome control that warms to ember on hover. Reserved for primary navigation.
components.html: Home

components.name: Searchbar
components.description: 12px radius pill. Focus shifts stroke to ember and adds 4px ember-soft halo.
components.css: .ds-search{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;width:420px;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset,0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28);color:var(--ink-dim);transition:border-color 140ms,box-shadow 180ms}.ds-search:focus-within{border-color:var(--ember);box-shadow:0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / .04) inset,0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / .28),0 0 0 4px var(--ember-soft)}.ds-search-icon{color:var(--ink-faint);flex:none}.ds-search input{flex:1;background:transparent;border:0;outline:0;color:var(--ink);font:400 14px/1.5 Inter,sans-serif;letter-spacing:-0.003em}.ds-search input::placeholder{color:var(--ink-faint)}.ds-kbd{padding:3px 6px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink-faint);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:5px;font:500 10px/1 'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:0.08em}

components.name: Statusbar pill
components.description: Mono pill with pulsing dot. The ambient heartbeat readout.
components.css: .ds-statusbar{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--ink-dim);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:8px;font:500 11px/1.2 'JetBrains Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-statusbar .ds-status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--status-up);animation:ds-pulse 2.6s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) infinite}@keyframes ds-pulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 60%,transparent)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 0%,transparent)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 color-mix(in oklch,var(--status-up) 0%,transparent)}}

components.name: Section head
components.description: Mono numeral eyebrow + Inter title, 1px hairline rule beneath. The system's wayfinding.
components.html:
02 /

Infrastructure

5 hosts . all up

components.name: Bento tile (media)
components.description: Music / Plex signature. Translucent over an ambient blurred artwork backdrop. The sole sanctioned glass surface.
components.html:
01 /

Now Playing

A blurred album-cover gradient sits behind this tile at z-index -1. The tile is translucent over it.
components.css: .ds-bento-stage{position:relative;width:360px;height:200px;isolation:isolate;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden}.ds-bento-bg{position:absolute;inset:-40px -20px;z-index:-1;background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%,oklch(0.55 0.18 35),oklch(0.30 0.10 280) 60%,oklch(0.20 0.05 50));filter:blur(20px) saturate(1.1);opacity:0.85;pointer-events:none}.ds-bento-tile{padding:18px;background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--bg-card) 78%,transparent);border:1px solid var(--line-soft);border-radius:18px;backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(1.15);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px) saturate(1.15);transition:border-color 300ms ease}.ds-bento-tile:hover{border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--ember) 35%,var(--line-soft))}.ds-bento-title{margin:6px 0 4px;color:var(--ink);font:600 17px/1.3 Inter,sans-serif;letter-spacing:-0.015em}.ds-bento-body{margin:0;color:var(--ink-dim);font:400 13px/1.5 Inter,sans-serif;letter-spacing:-0.003em}

narrative.overview: A private operations console, not a product. One operator (the homeowner) sits at it after dark to glance at Plex queues, NAS pools, Homey zones, Docker stacks, and a wall of bookmarked services. The aesthetic is a warm-graphite workshop lit by a single banked ember, not a glassy SaaS dashboard, not a neon ops center, not the macOS native vocabulary. Density matters: a global density switch and per-page variant attribute must keep the system legible across phone, tablet, and desktop. The Home page also reshuffles itself by time of day. Media surfaces (Plex, Music) are the single carve-out from no-glass: a blurred ambient artwork backdrop sits behind translucent foreground tiles. Chrome glass on dashboard, infrastructure, or settings surfaces is still forbidden.
keyCharacteristics: Warm graphite (chroma 0.01-0.016, hue 50-60) underneath, never neutral grey, never blue-shifted.
A single ember accent across every page; semantic-only sage/steel/alarm for state.
Mono font carries the technical voice: counters, labels, status text, eyebrows.
Cards are uniform, low-shadow, hover lifts 2px and warms by one chroma step.
Section heads use a numeric eyebrow (02 / ) plus a hairline rule, never a solid bar.
Media pages get translucent bento tiles over a blurred artwork backdrop. Nowhere else.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Ember is the only decorative color. Sage, steel, and alarm are reserved for semantic state and data viz. Adding a fourth decorative hue is the single fastest way to break the system.

rules.name: The Warm Graphite Rule
rules.body: No background, border, or text color may have hue outside the 50-60 range. Hue 230 (steel) is permitted only inside a data-viz frame; hue 145 / 85 / 28 (status) only when bound to a live system state.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: --bg is oklch(0.19 0.01 50), never #000. Even the deepest scrollbar track keeps a chroma of 0.01.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Inter for prose and chrome, JetBrains Mono for any value, identifier, label, status timestamp, or technical readout.

rules.name: The Tracked-Mono Rule
rules.body: Mono is always tracked open (letter-spacing 0.08-0.14em) and usually uppercased. Tight or mixed-case mono in a label slot reads as a bug.

rules.name: The No-Italic Rule
rules.body: <em> is reserved for ember-colored emphasis at display scale; it is never rendered italic.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Touch Rule
rules.body: Cards rest flat-with-shadow, and they lift translateY(-2px) plus the ember-soft ring on hover. 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1). Bento tiles on media pages warm the border instead of lifting.

rules.name: The Inset Highlight Rule
rules.body: Every elevated surface includes the 1px inset white-04 stroke at the top edge. Without it, cards look pasted on.

rules.name: The Media-Glass Carve-out
rules.body: Glass (backdrop-filter) is permitted only when a blurred ambient artwork backdrop sits at z-index -1 behind the surface. Plex hero and Music bento qualify; infrastructure, Homey, Docker, NAS, settings, and Home tiles do not.

dos: Do keep every neutral inside hue 50-60 with chroma 0.01-0.016. Warm graphite, never blue-grey, never neutral.
Do use ember as the single decorative voice. If a screen feels flat, lift one element with ember-hi text on hover, not a second accent color.
Do set every number, label, identifier, status timestamp, and eyebrow in JetBrains Mono, tracked open at 0.08-0.14em.
Do wrap status pills around .status-dot and let up pulse on a 2.6s ease-out cadence. The pulse is the system's heartbeat.
Do use the inset white-04 + drop oklch(0/.28) shadow pair on every resting card, and add the ember-soft ring on hover.
Do lift cards translateY(-2px) over 180ms cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1) on hover. Same curve every time.
Do preface section titles with a mono numeral eyebrow in ember (01 / , 02 / ).
Do respect both html[data-density=dense] and body[data-variant=dense|playful]. Both must keep working, and neither may re-theme.
Do use OKLCH everywhere. The palette is computed in OKLCH; hex is a deliverable, not a source.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff. The bg floor is oklch(0.19 0.01 50), the ink ceiling is oklch(0.95 0.01 60).
Don't introduce a second decorative accent. No teals, no purples, no second oranges. Sage / steel / alarm are state-only and data-viz-only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left: 3px solid ...). Borders are full-perimeter, 1px, in line-soft or line.
Don't apply gradient text by default. The only sanctioned gradient text is the playful-variant greeting <em>, and only there.
Don't add glassmorphism on chrome surfaces. The Plex / Music media-backdrop pairing is the sole carve-out: backdrop-filter over an ambient blurred artwork backdrop, and only there.
Don't ship hero-metric templates: big-gradient-number above small-label above supporting-stats.
Don't italicize text. <em> is colored, never slanted.
Don't use solid filled primary buttons. Action emphasis comes from hover-warming and lift, not a permanent ember fill.
Don't nest cards. A panel inside a card inside the shell is always wrong; flatten or use bg-raised for the inner surface.
Don't animate layout properties (width, padding, margin). Animate transform, opacity, box-shadow, color, border-color, background.
Don't use bouncy or elastic easing. The system curve is cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1). Nothing overshoots.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Commas, colons, semicolons, periods, parentheses.
